<?php namespace Faker\Provider\is_IS; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { /** * @var array Some email domains in Denmark. */ protected static $freeEmailDomain = [ 'gmail.com', 'yahoo.com', 'hotmail.com', 'visir.is', 'simnet.is', 'internet.is', ]; /** * @var array Some TLD. */ protected static $tld = [ 'com', 'com', 'com', 'net', 'is', 'is', 'is', ]; }
